visuals.title: MSE vs MAE vs Huber Loss
visuals.description: Plots showing how each loss penalizes errors of different magnitudes.

visuals.title: Binary Cross-Entropy Curve
visuals.description: Shows cross-entropy loss for true label y=1 as prediction varies from 0 to 1.

visuals.title: From Loss to Parameter Updates
visuals.description: Shows how loss gradients flow back through the network to update weights.
